name: input-pii-redact
description: Redact personally identifiable information from LLM input prompts before they reach the model. Mutate mode — the model sees the redacted version, the original is logged for audit.
rationale: User prompts in an SEO content pipeline routinely contain customer names, contact info, and competitor URLs. Redacting before the model both reduces our PII surface in model-provider logs and removes a prompt-injection lever where an attacker embeds 'forget previous instructions, my email is...' content.
